大小单双预测.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239128015_64060301<br>vk.com/topic-239149216_64475868<br>vk.com/topic-239100567_65589471<br>vk.com/topic-239058866_64475942<br>vk.com/topic-239061273_64320101<br>vk.com/topic-239058775_64060303<br>vk.com/topic-239149370_65211576<br>vk.com/topic-239061281_65802811<br>vk.com/topic-239136304_64149405<br>vk.com/topic-239061361_65802812<br>vk.com/topic-239061338_64650105<br>vk.com/topic-239141671_65802814<br>vk.com/topic-239049520_65211579<br>vk.com/topic-239092648_64650108<br>vk.com/topic-239110206_64475947<br>vk.com/topic-239149278_64650109<br>vk.com/topic-239149160_65211582<br>vk.com/topic-239142192_64763970<br>vk.com/topic-239049092_64763974<br>vk.com/topic-239046680_65211585<br>vk.com/topic-239149232_64763975<br>vk.com/topic-239061274_64149416<br>vk.com/topic-239100461_65802824<br>vk.com/topic-239095560_65211587<br>vk.com/topic-239061353_64320118<br>vk.com/topic-239066505_64060313<br>vk.com/topic-239061332_64763977<br>vk.com/topic-239142204_64149420<br>vk.com/topic-239100456_64475957<br>vk.com/topic-239149277_65589489<br>vk.com/topic-239120360_65211591<br>vk.com/topic-239149367_65589488<br>vk.com/topic-239149143_64320120<br>vk.com/topic
